title: Set up your workspace
subtitle: A few quick steps to get your team working — no manual required.
allDoneBody: Your workspace is set up. Start a project or open your work inbox.

branding.title: Make it yours
branding.description: Add your logo and brand colour so the workspace looks like your company.

people.title: Invite your team
people.description: Invite your first teammates and sketch your reporting structure.
people.orgChartBody: Group people into departments and reporting lines — this drives task routing, delegation and approvals.

workflow.title: Add your first workflow
workflow.description: Start from a certified workflow pack or design your own, then publish it so your team can create work.
workflow.designerBody: Open the workflow designer to build a workflow from blocks and subflows.
workflow.packsBody: Certified packs ship ready-made workflows you can import and adapt.
workflow.packsEmpty: No certified packs are available to browse yet.
